style_name: Impact Burst Halftone Comic Poster Style
summary: A loud retro comic poster system built from thick black ink, flat high-saturation colors, oversized impact typography, exaggerated illustrated subjects, diagonal props, speech bursts, smoke puffs, halftone dots, and distressed screen-print grain.
prompt_template: Create an image in impact-burst-halftone-comic-poster-style. Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}. Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, interacting with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, in {LOCATION}. Include {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Layout: use a bold cropped comic-poster composition. Put a huge condensed cream block-letter headline reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" across the upper band, with "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" as tiny impact microcopy if it stays clean. Place the main subject large in the lower two-thirds and let the oversized prop cut diagonally across the body or foreground. Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL} as a graphic impact mark. Style: thick uneven black contour lines, flat hot-orange and aged-cream character shapes, saturated cyan backdrop, lemon-yellow speech-burst corner, muted olive prop color, small gray accent, distressed screen-print texture, halftone dots, paper grain, rough ink edges, and slight print misregistration. Avoid: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, artist signature, copied reference character, copied exact pose, copied exact text, brand logos, licensed characters, photorealism, 3D, glossy gradients, soft airbrush shading, clean vector polish, crowded paragraphs, and muted corporate design.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, artist signature, copied reference character, copied exact pose, copied exact text, brand logo, licensed character, photorealism, realistic portrait, 3D render, glossy gradient, airbrush shading, polished vector logo, corporate minimal poster, soft pastel palette, long paragraphs, crowded typography, clean digital texture, no grain

variables.SUBJECT: main illustrated subject
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized object, product, tool, weapon, camera, device, or prop
variables.LOCATION: flat poster setting or symbolic backdrop
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: speech bursts, smoke puffs, starbursts, cyan blocks, yellow corner shapes, impact marks
variables.MAIN_TEXT: short comic headline, e.g. ZAP!, CRASH!, BANG!, WHAM!
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny impact caption or small supporting word
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: sparkle, starburst, lightning slash, jagged separator, small smoke puff
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: simple flat-color wardrobe or stylized body treatment

variables.SUBJECT: a manic orange-and-cream comic inventor with spiky black hair
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: grinning in shock while testing a sputtering device
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: oversized muted-olive retro ray camera with a huge black lens
variables.LOCATION: flat cyan poster window under a black impact field
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: yellow jagged corner speech burst, off-white smoke puffs, small sparkle marks, rough paper speckles
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: white four-point sparkle and tiny lightning slash
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: flat orange jacket, cream negative-space highlights, black ink hair and eyebrows

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a horizontal 16:9 poster in impact-burst-halftone-comic-poster-style. Scene: a manic orange-and-cream comic inventor with spiky black hair grinning in shock while testing a sputtering oversized muted-olive retro ray camera with a huge black lens, in a flat cyan poster window under a black impact field. Push the huge cream headline "ZAP!" across the upper-left band, place the inventor off-center, and let the ray camera angle through the middle foreground. Include a yellow jagged corner speech burst, off-white smoke puffs, small sparkle marks, rough paper speckles, thick black contour lines, flat hot-orange and aged-cream shapes, cyan backdrop, distressed screen-print texture, halftone dots, paper grain, rough ink edges, and slight print misregistration.
